visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a bright, spacious warehouse-style store. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a light pink ribbed top and a white skirt, stands in front of a massive inflatable brown bear decoration wearing a Santa hat and a red scarf. She points toward the bear while speaking. (2) The camera zooms in on a shelf where a white price tag is displayed, showing the number 8,399. The woman points at the tag with a surprised expression. Behind her are stacked green boxes of Christmas decorations and golden reindeer figures. (3) The scene transitions to the woman walking past other shoppers with a shopping cart in the background. She stops in front of a different display featuring a large gingerbread man figure. She smiles and gestures toward it, then playfully touches its arm. Bright indoor lights and high warehouse ceilings are visible throughout.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 8399元買不買? 巨大聖誕小熊. [Variety]: 什麼?. (2) [Subtitle]: 一定要買這個. [Subtitle]: 那個. (3) [Subtitle]: 熊熊啊 聖誕節要到了. [Subtitle]: 太大了. (4) [Subtitle]: 你不是最喜歡過聖誕節. (5) [Subtitle]: 我喜歡 可是來好市多 就可以逛到很多燈飾. (6) [Variety]: 超大的耶. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且它怎麼樣. (8) [Slogan]: 一定會特價!. (9) [Subtitle]: 現在下單 跟好市多說 特價時後我來買. (10) [Subtitle]: 我們看看它多少錢. (11) [Subtitle]: 8399 有附地樁繩索 讓你個以固定在 你的室外地板上. (12) [Subtitle]: 它沒有附送通充氣機. (13) [Slogan]: 可以等特價399 的時候來買. (14) [Variety]: OK 然後你就會吹氣吹到"屎". (15) [Subtitle]: 沒有啦 我覺得更適合台灣的是這個. (16) [Slogan]: 這個好可愛我也喜歡這個.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 female shoppers in the background, 1 child partially visible in a cart.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long straight black hair, wearing a pale pink off-the-shoulder short-sleeved top and a white midi skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse retail interior with high ceilings, exposed metal beams, and industrial shelving. Bright white fluorescent lighting illuminates aisles filled with large boxed merchandise and Christmas displays including inflatable figures and illuminated reindeer.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful, rhythmic acoustic guitar track begins immediately, accompanied by a bright female voice speaking with high energy and an excited tone. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect occurs as the camera pans, marking a transition in the visual focus. The speaker's pitch rises when mentioning the price. (3) A subtle 'pop' sound effect is heard as a text graphic appears. The female speaker continues at a fast pace, while a male voice off-camera provides short, humorous rebuttals in a slightly lower, teasing tone. (4) The BGM remains consistent in tempo and volume, providing a steady energetic backdrop to the continuous dialogue. Faint background murmur of the store is audible during brief pauses in speech.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Observation -> Commentary -> Alternative Choice
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a casual and humorous shopping experience at Costco, highlighting high-priced seasonal decorations and providing personal commentary on their value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Organic shopping vlog style without clear promotional markers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media style shopping vlog characterized by high-density text overlays and upbeat music to maintain viewer engagement.
